name: Longmont Small Animal Hospital
owner: Mimi Elliott, DVM & Tory Wunder, DVM
painPoints: Closed Sundays — pet emergencies don't wait
After-hours emergencies referred out — could capture triage calls
High review volume suggests high call volume — potential overflow
strengths: AAHA Accredited — gold standard for veterinary practices
Female-owned practice — Drs. Elliott and Wunder
Extended weekday hours until 9pm — shows commitment
Exotic pet care (small mammals, reptiles, amphibians) — uncommon specialty
EzyVet client portal + online pharmacy already in place
conversationStarters: AAHA accreditation is the gold standard — that says a lot about your standards
Exotic pet care is really hard to find around here
suggestedApproach: Already tech-forward with EzyVet portal and online pharmacy. Smaller opportunity — they may have most basics covered. Best angle: Sunday/after-hours emergency triage calls, or automated appointment reminder system. This is a lower-priority stop unless conversation reveals a hidden pain point.
